title: China Just Built A Two Brain AI Robot: One Body, Two Minds
summary: China's JAKA Pi uses a split AI brain for real-time control of a compact humanoid. Vietnam introduced the Dyno and VR-H3 humanoids for security, homes, factories, and service roles. NVIDIA released Isaac GR00T, a six-foot open robot platform with Jetson Thor onboard compute, enabling researchers to integrate AI perception, control, and manipulation.
